category_sources: source_facts.description says it is a code build system; official README describes Tundra as a high-performance code build system for incremental builds.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is "tundra"; official README heading is "Tundra, a build system".
docs_sources: Official README explicitly directs users to doc/manual.asciidoc for detailed usage information.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already set to https://github.com/deplinenoise/tundra; per instruction, repo is returned as null and not re-evaluated.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies a build system; official README and GitHub topics mention incremental builds, native development, Lua, and cross-platform support.
